data.summary: Insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement for a 24-hour reminder SMS.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 24-hour reminder SMS, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the use case mentions a 24-hour reminder, there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this reminder is implemented or functioning as required. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of time-based trigger (24h before) implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
